_comment: Copy this file to ./config.json (gitignored) and edit to your taste.

redaction._comment: Set real_username to the part of your home path to replace. Auto-detected from $USER if empty.

_schedule_comment: Controls when wiki-build and wiki-lint run. Values: on-sync (after every sync), daily, weekly, manual, never.
_adapters_comment: Opt-in adapters (meeting, jira, pdf). All disabled by default — enable explicitly.

pdf._comment: Extract text from PDF files into raw/ markdown.

jira._comment: Jira REST API adapter. Requires 'jira' package: pip install jira

web_clipper._comment: Obsidian Web Clipper intake path. See llmwiki/web_clipper.py.

scheduled_sync._comment: Auto-sync cadence for `llmwiki schedule` task generator. Values: daily | weekly | hourly. Run `llmwiki schedule` to generate OS-specific files.

_synthesis_comment: LLM backend for auto-synthesizing wiki source pages (#35). backend=dummy (default, offline) | ollama (local HTTP). Ollama must be running: `ollama serve`. Run `llmwiki synthesize --check` to probe the server.
